distinctive_elements: Baby Mario crying when knocked off Yoshi

notes: Documentation sources (Data Crystal, TASVideos, TCRF) contain extensive technical gameplay information, level design details, and debug content, but do NOT contain documented music parameters (tempo, keys, chord progressions, time signatures, or melodic analysis). Wikipedia confirms Koji Kondo as composer but provides no musical detail. No area-specific music data is available in provided sources. Audio/music extraction would require dedicated game music documentation or soundtrack liner notes not included in these sources.
